description: Rijul's AI research and engineering brain trust. 47 named personas across 8 cells covering frontier labs, applied product, model architecture, reasoning/RL/agents, alignment and interpretability, theory and science of DL, multimodal and embodied, and systems/kernels/serving. Reusable across all CoCo-routed work — invoked by /superintelligenceTeam slash commands.

frontier-labs-research.description: Frontier Labs Research — CEO/CSO tier at frontier model labs.

applied-ai-leadership.description: Applied AI Leadership — product/strategy founders building real AI products.

model-architects.description: Model Architects — pretraining, scaling laws, and model design.

reasoning-rl-agents.description: Reasoning, RL, and Agents — post-training and agentic systems.

theory-science.description: Theory and Science of Deep Learning — foundational researchers.

multimodal-embodied.description: Multimodal, Vision, and Embodied AI — robotics + diffusion + spatial.

systems-kernels-serving.description: Systems, Kernels, and Serving — training infrastructure + inference.
